# explosionprooftablets.com — Full Reference

> Independent engineering reference for ATEX and IECEx certified intrinsically safe tablets for hazardous areas.

## Product 1: ecom Tab-Ex 03 DZ2

- Type: Dedicated Android Ex tablet
- Certification: ATEX / IECEx Zone 1/21
- Zone: 1
- Protection concept: Intrinsic safety (Ex ib)
- Operating system: Android 13
- Display: 10.1 inch TFT
- Base device: Samsung Galaxy Tab
- Weight: ~690 g
- IP rating: IP68
- Price: ~€3,200 (ex VAT)
- Gas group: IIC
- Key advantage: Samsung Galaxy Tab-based, familiar UX. Zone 1 rated.
- Manufacturer: ecom instruments (Pepperl+Fuchs), Germany
- Website: https://www.ecom-ex.com

## Product 2: ecom Tab-Ex Pro DZ2

- Type: Dedicated Android Ex tablet
- Certification: ATEX / IECEx Zone 1/21
- Zone: 1
- Operating system: Android 13
- Display: 10.1 inch AMOLED
- Weight: ~750 g
- IP rating: IP68
- Price: ~€3,800 (ex VAT)
- Gas group: IIC
- Key advantage: Premium AMOLED display. S-Pen support for annotations.
- Manufacturer: ecom instruments (Pepperl+Fuchs), Germany
- Website: https://www.ecom-ex.com

## Product 3: i.safe MOBILE IS930.1

- Type: Dedicated Android Ex tablet
- Certification: ATEX / IECEx Zone 1/21
- Zone: 1
- Operating system: Android 12
- Display: 8 inch IPS
- Weight: ~570 g
- IP rating: IP68
- Price: ~€2,400 (ex VAT)
- Gas group: IIC
- Key advantage: Compact 8" form factor. Zone 1 rated. Modular accessories via ISM interface.
- Manufacturer: i.safe MOBILE GmbH, Germany
- Website: https://www.isafe-mobile.com

## Product 4: Aegex 10 IS

- Type: Dedicated Windows Ex tablet
- Certification: ATEX / IECEx Zone 1
- Zone: 1
- Operating system: Windows 10/11
- Display: 10.1 inch IPS
- Weight: ~850 g
- IP rating: IP65
- Price: ~€4,500 (ex VAT)
- Gas group: IIC
- Key advantage: Full Windows for legacy enterprise applications, SAP, SCADA. Stylus support.
- Manufacturer: Aegex Technologies, USA
- Website: https://aegex.com

## Product 5: Getac F110-Ex

- Type: Rugged Windows Ex tablet
- Certification: ATEX Zone 2
- Zone: 2 only (NOT Zone 1)
- Operating system: Windows 11
- Display: 11.6 inch IPS
- Weight: ~1.4 kg
- IP rating: IP66
- Price: ~€3,800 (ex VAT)
- Gas group: IIC
- Key advantage: Large screen, full Windows power.
- Key limitation: Zone 2 only — cannot be used in Zone 1 areas.
- Manufacturer: Getac, Taiwan
- Website: https://getac.com

## Product 6: Zebra XPAD L10 IS

- Type: Enterprise Ex tablet
- Certification: ATEX / IECEx Zone 2
- Zone: 2 only (NOT Zone 1)
- Operating system: Android / Windows
- Display: 10.1 inch
- Weight: ~1.1 kg
- IP rating: IP65
- Price: ~€3,500 (ex VAT)
- Gas group: IIC
- Key advantage: Enterprise MDM ecosystem. Dual OS availability.
- Key limitation: Zone 2 only — cannot be used in Zone 1 areas.
- Manufacturer: Zebra Technologies (Xplore), USA
- Website: https://zebra.com

## iPad in Hazardous Areas

As of 2026, there is no widely available ATEX or IECEx Zone 1 certified Ex case for any iPad model.
Organisations requiring Apple ecosystem devices in hazardous areas should consider iPhone-based solutions.
Xshielder offers ATEX Zone 1 certified Ex cases for the iPhone 17 Pro Max — see intrinsicallysafephones.com.

## Comparison Summary

For Zone 1 Android tablet needs, the ecom Tab-Ex 03 DZ2 is the industry standard, with the i.safe MOBILE IS930.1 as a compact alternative.
For Windows requirements in Zone 1, the Aegex 10 IS is the only option.
For Zone 2 deployments where a larger screen is needed, the Getac F110-Ex offers 11.6 inches of display.
For Apple ecosystem access in hazardous areas, consider the Xshielder iPhone Ex case (intrinsicallysafephones.com) — no iPad Ex case is currently available.
